summary: Opening & Closing Meeting (BACF6-09) Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Admin page and Public client form page working correctly. Full workflow verified: create from Stage 1 plan → send to client → client submits attendance → PDF generation.

issues: Console warnings about HTML structure (<tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody>) - cosmetic React hydration warning from development tooling, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation using ReportLab produces professional bilingual document (205KB+)
Admin page shows stats cards (total, draft, sent to client, submitted) and table with action buttons
Create modal properly filters to show only client-accepted Stage 1 plans without existing meeting forms
View modal displays all meeting details including attendees table and meeting notes
Public client form page properly shows company info, audit details, and form state
Submitted form shows green checkmark success message with Arabic text
Arabic RTL support working correctly throughout pages
Cyan/teal color theme consistent with meeting form design (BACF6-09)

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed, 2 skipped due to existing data)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Opening & Closing Meeting (BACF6-09) feature is fully functional. All backend endpoints at /api/opening-closing-meetings working. Admin page at /opening-closing-meetings shows stats (total, draft, sent to client, submitted), table with meetings, create modal (filters for client_accepted Stage 1 plans), and view modal with attendees and notes. Public client form at /meeting-form/:accessToken shows company info, audit details, attendees table (editable when pending), and notes fields. Already submitted form shows success message. PDF generation works (205KB+). The existing meeting for 'Test Company for Proposal' is already submitted with 2 attendees.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/opening-closing-meetings: Create meeting from Stage 1 plan - WORKING
backend_endpoints.POST /api/opening-closing-meetings/{id}/: Send to client, get link - WORKING

frontend_components.admin_page: Opening & Closing Meetings page at /opening-closing-meetings with RTL Arabic support
frontend_components.stats_cards: 4 cards showing total (1), draft (0), sent to client (0), submitted (1)
frontend_components.meetings_table: Shows organization, audit type, audit date, attendees count, status, actions
frontend_components.create_modal: Opens with Stage 1 plan dropdown - filters for client_accepted plans without existing meetings
frontend_components.view_modal: Shows audit info, attendees table with names/designations/dates, meeting notes, submission date
frontend_components.action_buttons: View (eye), Download PDF, Send to Client (if not sent), Delete - all working
frontend_components.public_form_page: Shows company info, audit details, attendees table, notes fields when pending; success message when submitted

workflow_tested.create_flow: Create meeting from client-accepted Stage 1 plan - creates with proper data
workflow_tested.send_to_client: Admin sends link → meeting marked as sent_to_client=true → link generated
workflow_tested.client_access: Client accesses /meeting-form/:token → sees form or submitted state
workflow_tested.client_submit: Client fills attendees table + notes → submits → status changes to 'submitted'
workflow_tested.admin_view: Admin can view all details, download PDF, see status updates

pdf_content_verified.header: OPENING & CLOSING MEETING with BACF6-09 reference
pdf_content_verified.company_info: Organization name, file no, audit type, audit date, standards
pdf_content_verified.attendees_table: S.N, Name, Designation, Opening Meeting Date, Closing Meeting Date
pdf_content_verified.meeting_notes: Opening meeting notes, Closing meeting notes sections

mocked_apis.note: No external integrations - all features are self-contained. Email sending is mocked (logs to console) but doesn't affect functionality.
